headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -8.0)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 112% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 103 quotes, including 65 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and annoyance today.

• The frustration score of 20.4 sits in the upper portion of the typical range, though well below the peak of 162.9 seen in recent months.

• Optimism rebounded sharply from yesterday's deep negative of -44.0, while fears remained steady at very low levels.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
